issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for the Mintlify CLI and configuration steps.

scenarios.name: Bootstrap Mintlify docs with quickstart and API reference
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses mint.json navigation groups, MDX components (Steps, CodeGroup, Note, Card), and api page frontmatter; baseline references generic Markdown/Docusaurus patterns missing Mintlify-specific config.

scenarios.name: Generate API reference page for POST /v1/users with playground
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes frontmatter with `api: "POST ..."`, uses `<ParamField>` and `<ResponseExample>` blocks that auto-create the playground; baseline returns plain Markdown tables without Mintlify components.
